title: SunWorld Optimized
description: A optimization modpack with QoL features specially created for SunWorld.
body:
This modpack includes many mods to drastically improve performance and QoL.

# Vanilla Minecraft:
![Vanilla Minecraft with 142fps in SunWorld](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bad37ff432622ae3c53355e7c7299a5f624f7b8f.png)

# Optimized Minecraft:
![Optimized Minecraft with 470fps](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4edec150a4e43a01a4fe820a37ddfa28d1191534.png)

This Modpack requires the Modrinth App. [https://modrinth.com/app](https://modrinth.com/app)

## Attributions:
Vanilla Tweaks Resourcepack Included 
[https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/) <--- You can make your own resourcepack here!
